text.title: Growth LinkedIn Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the positioning statement (one ICP + one pain + one outcome) locked in?

branch.question: Can the operator commit 30 minutes/day to engagement (≥10 stranger replies)?

branch.conclusion: Run weekly rotation: 3 typed posts + 10 daily replies + DM trigger.
Skip this methodology. Posting without reply-density gets suppressed; fix the slot first.
Skip launch; lock positioning (ICP + pain + outcome) before posting.

text.example: positioning=(saas founders, churn diagnosis, +2pt retention) slot=30min/day → run rotation per r3-ten-replies-daily.
